hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import glob, json, os, re, subprocess
sid = os.environ.get('CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID', '')
files = glob.glob(os.path.expanduser(f'~/.claude/projects/**/{sid}.jsonl'), recursive=True)
if not files: exit()
cache = max((int(m.group(1)) for line in open(files[0]) for m in [re.search(r'\"cache_read_input_tokens\":(\d+)', line)] if m), default=0)
if cache > 80000:
    proj = ''
    title = sid[:8]
    try:
        hist = os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/history.jsonl')
        for line in open(hist):
            e = json.loads(line)
            if e.get('sessionId') == sid:
                proj = os.path.basename(e.get('project', ''))
                title = (e.get('display', '') or sid)[:60]
                break
    except: pass
    u = os.getuid()
    e = {**os.environ, 'XDG_RUNTIME_DIR': f'/run/user/{u}', 'DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS': f'unix:path=/run/user/{u}/bus'}
    body = f'{cache:,} cached tokens — consider /clear\n{proj}: {title}'
    subprocess.run(['notify-send', '-u', 'normal', '-i', 'dialog-warning', 'Claude Code', body], env=e, capture_output=True)
" 2>/dev/null || true
